title: Errors in Verilating RTL or wrong SystemC version?
body:
I need to find out how to correlate an error I am getting when Verilating the (RTL) code so that I can locate itto attempt to fix it or determine if there is a problem due to, for example, the wrong SystemC being used with Verilator.  I am using Verilator 5.033 and SystemC 2.3.3.

 A few of the errors are:

```
Vhydra_tile_main___024root__DepSet_h7d236311__10.cpp: In function Гўв‚¬Лњvoid Vhydra_tile_main___024root___nba_sequent__TOP__16(Vhydra_tile_main___024root*)Гўв‚¬в„ў:
Vhydra_tile_main___024root__DepSet_h7d236311__10.cpp:8088:49: error: invalid operands of types Гўв‚¬Лњunsigned intГўв‚¬в„ў and Гўв‚¬Лњsc_core::sc_signal_inout_if<sc_dt::sc_bv<1388> >*Гўв‚¬в„ў to binary Гўв‚¬Лњoperator&Гўв‚¬в„ў
     vlSelfRef.cnoc_maxi_req[0U] = ((0xfffffffcU & vlSelfRef.cnoc_maxi_req[0U])
                                     ~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Vhydra_tile_main___024root__DepSet_h7d236311__10.cpp:8142:52: error: invalid operands of types Гўв‚¬Лњunsigned intГўв‚¬в„ў and Гўв‚¬Лњsc_core::sc_signal_inout_if<sc_dt::sc_bv<1388> >*Гўв‚¬в„ў to binary Гўв‚¬Лњoperator&Гўв‚¬в„ў
     vlSelfRef.cnoc_maxi_req[0U] = (0x74000000U | ((3U
                                                    ~~
                                                    & vlSelfRef.cnoc_maxi_req[0U])
                                                    ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Vhydra_tile_main___024root__DepSet_h7d236311__10.cpp:8196:43: error: lvalue required as left operand of assignment
                                     << 2U));
                                           ^
Vhydra_tile_main___024root__DepSet_h7d236311__10.cpp:8225:60: error: lvalue required as left operand of assignment
                                                     >> 1U)));
                                                            ^
Vhydra_tile_main___024root__DepSet_h7d236311__10.cpp:8226:48: error: invalid operands of types Гўв‚¬Лњunsigned intГўв‚¬в„ў and Гўв‚¬Лњsc_core::sc_signal_inout_if<sc_dt::sc_bv<1388> >*Гўв‚¬в„ў to binary Гўв‚¬Лњoperator&Гўв‚¬в„ў
     vlSelfRef.cnoc_maxi_req[3U] = (0xffffff80U & vlSelfRef.cnoc_maxi_req[3U]);
                                    ~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Vhydra_tile_main___024root__DepSet_h7d236311__10.cpp:8227:49: error: invalid operands of types Гўв‚¬Лњunsigned intГўв‚¬в„ў and Гўв‚¬Лњsc_core::sc_signal_inout_if<sc_dt::sc_bv<1388> >*Гўв‚¬в„ў to binary Гўв‚¬Лњoperator&Гўв‚¬в„ў
     vlSelfRef.cnoc_maxi_req[3U] = ((0xfe00007fU & vlSelfRef.cnoc_maxi_req[3U])
                                     ~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Vhydra_tile_main___024root__DepSet_h7d236311__10.cpp:8241:48: error: invalid operands of types Гўв‚¬Лњunsigned intГўв‚¬в„ў and Гўв‚¬Лњsc_core::sc_signal_inout_if<sc_dt::sc_bv<1388> >*Гўв‚¬в„ў to binary Гўв‚¬Лњoperator&Гўв‚¬в„ў
     vlSelfRef.cnoc_maxi_req[3U] = ((0x1ffffffU & vlSelfRef.cnoc_maxi_req[3U])
                                     ~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Vhydra_tile_main___024root__DepSet_h7d236311__10.cpp:8246:56: error: lvalue required as left operand of assignment
                                               << 0x19U));
                                                        ^

```
